claim: The FY2024 Budget requests $73.3 billion in gross discretionary appropriations for the Department of Housing and Urban Development.

sources.title: CRS Report IF12278 - HUD Appropriations, FY2024
sources.exact_quote_user_reported: The President's FY2024 budget request proposes $73.3 billion in gross discretionary appropriations for HUD, about $1.1 billion (2%) more than the $72.2 billion in FY2023.

verification_steps: 2. Locate the HUD discretionary appropriation for FY2024
discrepancy_note: Original demo receipt ($63.1B) was flagged as incorrect. This receipt records the corrected claim text, recomputed hash, and user-reported archive candidates for source verification.
